---
title: "Research & Publications"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
library(jsonlite)

normalize_string_list <- function(value) {
  if (is.null(value)) return(character(0))
  if (is.list(value)) value <- unlist(value, use.names = FALSE)
  value <- as.character(value)
  value <- trimws(value)
  value[!is.na(value) & value != ""]
}

normalize_category_keys <- function(values) {
  keys <- tolower(normalize_string_list(values))
  unique(keys[keys != ""])
}

extract_presentation_keywords <- function(item) {
  keywords <- normalize_string_list(item$keywords)
  instances <- item$instances

  if (!is.null(instances) && is.list(instances) && length(instances) > 0) {
    for (instance in instances) {
      keywords <- c(keywords, normalize_string_list(instance$keywords))
    }
  }

  unique(keywords)
}

# 0. Filters
publications <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/publications.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
presentations <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/presentations.json")

}, error = function(e) list())
posters <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/posters.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
events <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/events.json")
}, error = function(e) list())

pub_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(publications, function(x) normalize_string_list(x$keywords))))
pres_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(presentations, extract_presentation_keywords)))
poster_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(posters, function(x) normalize_string_list(x$keywords))))
event_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(events, function(x) c(normalize_string_list(x$keywords), normalize_string_list(x$type)))))
all_categories <- normalize_category_keys(c(pub_cats, pres_cats, poster_cats, event_cats))
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  all_categories <- sort(all_categories)
}

cat('<div class="d-flex flex-wrap mb-4" id="category-pills">\n')
cat('<div class="category-pill active" data-category="all">All</div>\n')
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  for (cat in all_categories) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="category-pill" data-category="%s">%s</div>\n', cat, cat))
  }
}
cat('</div>\n')

# 1. Publications List
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default" id="listing-listing">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default" id="publications-list">\n')

if (length(publications) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(publications)) {
    item <- publications[[i]]
    keywords <- extract_presentation_keywords(item)
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(normalize_category_keys(keywords), collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in keywords) {
      cat_key <- tolower(cat)
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat_key)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }
    
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url) && item$url != "") item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    journal <- if (!is.null(item$journal)) item$journal else ""
    date_values <- normalize_string_list(item$date)
    date <- if (length(date_values) > 0) paste(date_values, collapse = "<br>") else ""
    authors <- if (!is.null(item$authors)) item$authors else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    linkStartTitle <- if (url != "#") sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>', url, target) else '<span class="no-external" style="color: inherit;">'
    linkEndTitle <- if (url != "#") '</a>' else '</span>'
    
    linkStartMeta <- if (url != "#") sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>', url, target) else '<div class="no-external">'
    linkEndMeta <- if (url != "#") '</a>' else '</div>'
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
%s%s%s
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s%s%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
%s
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-author">
%s
</div>
%s
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, linkStartTitle, title, linkEndTitle, linkStartTitle, journal, linkEndTitle, cats_html, linkStartMeta, date, authors, linkEndMeta))
  }
}

cat('</div>\n')
cat('<div class="listing-no-matching d-none">No matching items</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 2. Presentations -------------------------------------------------------«
cat('\n# Presentations\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(presentations)) {
    item <- presentations[[i]]
    item_url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else ""
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- normalize_string_list(item$keywords)
    base_type_values <- normalize_string_list(item$type)

    instances <- item$instances
    if (is.null(instances) || !is.list(instances) || length(instances) == 0) {
      instances <- list(list(
        url = item$url,
        date = item$date,
        event = item$event,
        event_url = item$event_url,
        context = item$context,
        context_url = item$context_url,
        type = item$type,
        description = item$description
      ))

    }

    first_instance_url <- ""
    if (length(instances) > 0 && !is.null(instances[[1]]$url) && instances[[1]]$url != "") {
      first_instance_url <- instances[[1]]$url
    }
    url <- if (first_instance_url != "") first_instance_url else if (item_url != "") item_url else "#"

    all_type_values <- base_type_values
    date_lines <- character(0)


    for (instance in instances) {
      inst_type_values <- normalize_string_list(instance$type)
      if (length(inst_type_values) == 0) inst_type_values <- base_type_values
      all_type_values <- c(all_type_values, inst_type_values)
      inst_type <- if (length(inst_type_values) > 0) paste(inst_type_values, collapse = ", ") else ""

      inst_event <- if (!is.null(instance$event)) instance$event else ""
      inst_event_url <- if (!is.null(instance$event_url)) instance$event_url else ""
      inst_url <- if (!is.null(instance$url)) instance$url else ""
      if (inst_url == "") inst_url <- url
      inst_context <- if (!is.null(instance$context)) instance$context else ""
      inst_dates <- normalize_string_list(instance$date)

      secondary_text <- ""
      if (inst_event != "" && inst_context != "") {
        secondary_text <- sprintf('%s (%s)', inst_event, inst_context)
      } else if (inst_event != "") {
        secondary_text <- inst_event
      } else if (inst_context != "") {
        secondary_text <- inst_context
      }
      
      secondary_html <- ""
      if (secondary_text != "") {
        secondary_html <- if (inst_event_url != "") {
          sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', inst_event_url, secondary_text)
        } else {
          secondary_text
        }
      }

      if (length(inst_dates) > 0) {
        for (inst_date in inst_dates) {
          icon_html <- ""
          if (inst_url != "") {
            icon_html <- sprintf(' <a class="no-external" href="%s" target="_blank" aria-label="Presentation link"><i class="bi bi-collection-play-fill"></i></a>', inst_url)
          }

          if (secondary_html != "") {
            if (inst_type != "") {
              date_lines <- c(date_lines, sprintf('%s, %s%s<br><span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', inst_date, inst_type, icon_html, secondary_html))
            } else {
              date_lines <- c(date_lines, sprintf('%s%s<br><span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', inst_date, icon_html, secondary_html))
            }
          } else {
            date_lines <- c(date_lines, sprintf('%s%s', inst_date, icon_html))
          }
        }
      } else if (secondary_html != "") {
        date_lines <- c(date_lines, sprintf('<span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', secondary_html))
      }
    }

    all_type_values <- unique(all_type_values)
    all_type_values <- all_type_values[all_type_values != ""]
    date <- if (length(date_lines) > 0) paste(date_lines, collapse = "<br><br>") else ""
    subtitle <- description
    
    data_categories <- ""
    cats_html <- ""
    all_item_cats <- c(all_type_values, keywords)
    
    if (length(all_item_cats) > 0) {
      data_categories_raw <- paste(normalize_category_keys(all_item_cats), collapse=",")
      data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
      for (cat in unique(all_item_cats)) {
        cat_key <- tolower(cat)
        escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat_key)
        cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
      }
    }
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 3. Posters
cat('\n# Posters\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(posters)) {
    item <- posters[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    type_values <- normalize_string_list(item$type)
    date_values <- normalize_string_list(item$date)
    event <- if (!is.null(item$event)) item$event else ""
    event_url <- if (!is.null(item$event_url)) item$event_url else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""

    
    subtitle <- description
    date <- if (length(date_values) > 0) paste(date_values, collapse = "<br>") else ""
    if (event != "") {
      event_html <- if (event_url != "") {
        sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', event_url, event)
      } else {
        event
      }

      if (date != "") {
        date <- sprintf('%s<br><span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', date, event_html)
      } else {
        date <- sprintf('<span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', event_html)
      }
    }

    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }

    keywords <- normalize_string_list(item$keywords)
    all_item_cats <- unique(c(type_values, keywords))

    data_categories_raw <- paste(normalize_category_keys(all_item_cats), collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in all_item_cats) {
      cat_key <- tolower(cat)
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat_key)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 4. Events
cat('\n# Events organization\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(events)) {
    item <- events[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    type_values <- normalize_string_list(item$type)
    date_values <- normalize_string_list(item$date)
    date <- if (length(date_values) > 0) paste(date_values, collapse = "<br>") else ""
    details <- if (!is.null(item$details)) item$details else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- normalize_string_list(item$keywords)
    
    all_item_cats <- unique(c(type_values, keywords))
    data_categories_raw <- paste(normalize_category_keys(all_item_cats), collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    subtitle <- description
    if (details != "") {
      details_html <- sprintf('<span class="listing-date-secondary">%s</span>', details)
      if (subtitle != "") {
        subtitle <- sprintf('%s<br>%s', subtitle, details_html)
      } else {
        subtitle <- details_html
      }
    }
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</b></h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')
```




<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const list = document.getElementById('publications-list');
    const pillsContainer = document.getElementById('category-pills');

    window.filterPublications = function(category) {
      document.querySelectorAll('#category-pills .category-pill').forEach(pill => {
        if (pill.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
          pill.classList.add('active');
        } else {
          pill.classList.remove('active');
        }
      });

      const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post');
      listItems.forEach(item => {
        if (category === 'all') {
          item.style.display = '';
        } else {
          const itemCatsBase64 = item.getAttribute('data-categories');
          if (itemCatsBase64) {
            const itemCats = decodeURIComponent(atob(itemCatsBase64)).split(',');
            item.style.display = itemCats.includes(category) ? '' : 'none';
          } else {
            item.style.display = 'none';
          }
        }
      });
    };

    if (pillsContainer) {
      pillsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target.classList.contains('category-pill')) {
          window.filterPublications(e.target.getAttribute('data-category'));
        }
      });
    }
  });
</script>
